Fare.title: Daily Fare
Fare.description: A single day's transportation fare data

morning.description: Morning fare amount in chosen currency

evening.description: Evening fare amount in chosen currency

crossedOut.description: Whether the day was marked as no work

userId.description: ID of the user who owns the record

/users/{userId}/fares/{fareId}.description: Stores daily fare records for a user

/users/{userId}/settings/preferences.description: Stores user-specific settings like default currency
